info.description: A REST-like API to access the MedInfo Service for the Safepolymed study.
info.title: MedInfo API - Safepolymed

get.description:
__Admin role required__
List all users for the API.

post.description:
__Admin role required__
Create a new user for the API. Ths user will receive an email with a token to set their password.
You can create users with the following roles: `admin`, `user`, `approver`.

__Admin role required__
Create a new service user for the API.
You can create users with the following roles: `admin`, `user`, `approver`.

get.description:
Get ADRs for one or more PZNs. Each PZN can have multiple ADRs.
The `lang` parameter can be used to specify the language of the ADR descriptions.
Valid values are `english`, `german`, and `german-simple`.
The default language is `english`.
`german-simple` returns the simplified German ADR description.
Retrieves guidelines by drug name and includes all related synonyms for the drug.

400.description: Invalid request format or too many names provided

get.description: Retrieves compounds by name and includes all related compounds sharing the same identifier.

400.description: Invalid request format or too many names provided

get.description:
Drug formulation codes and their descriptions that are used in the database.
These codes are used, e.g., in the compound interaction endpoint.
get.summary: List all drug formulation codes and their descriptions

get.description:
The result will be an array of drug-drug interactions between the provided compounds.
Each interaction will contain the plausibility, relevance, frequency, credibility,
and direction of the interaction.
The direction of the interaction describes the relationship between the victims (left)
and the perpetrators (right).
The left size and right side of the interaction can be more than one compounds if the same interaction
is observed between multiple compounds. This can be the case if the same compound is marketed
under different names or derivates are considered.
If the `details` query parameter is set to `true`, the interaction descriptions will be more detailed.
If the `doses` query parameter is set to `true`, the interaction will contain the relevant
doses/formulations of the compounds that are involved in the interaction.

post.description:
This is the batch version of the `GET /interactions/compounds` endpoint.
The result will be an array of drug-drug interactions between the provided compounds.
Each interaction will contain the plausibility, relevance, frequency, credibility,
and direction of the interaction.
The direction of the interaction describes the relationship between the victims (left)
and the perpetrators (right).
The left side and right side of the interaction can include multiple compounds if the same interaction
is observed between multiple compounds. This may happen if the same compound is marketed under different names.
If the `details` query parameter is set to `true`, the interaction descriptions will be more detailed.
If the `doses` query parameter is set to `true`, the relevant doses/formulations of the compounds involved will be included.
Ids for the queries must be unique.
Queries will be processed in parallel.
**Some/all queries may fail, resulting in error code `207`.**
The response will contain results for all queries, even if some failed.
**The user must check the status of each query in the batch.**
post.summary: Query drug-drug interactions between compounds in batch

400.description: Too many IDs or duplicate IDs

get.description:
The result will be an array of drug-drug interactions between the provided PZNs.
Each interaction will contain the plausibility, relevance, frequency, credibility,
and direction of the interaction.
The direction of the interaction describes the relationship between the victims (left)
and the perpetrators (right).
The left size and right side of the interaction can be more than one PZN if the same interaction
is observed between multiple PZNs.
If the `details` query parameter is set to `true`, the interaction descriptions will be more detailed.

post.description:
This is the batch version of the `GET /interactions/pzns` endpoint.
The result will be an array of drug-drug interactions between the provided PZNs.
Each interaction will contain the plausibility, relevance, frequency, credibility,
and direction of the interaction.
The direction of the interaction describes the relationship between the victims (left)
and the perpetrators (right).
The left size and right side of the interaction can be more than one PZN if the same interaction
is observed between multiple PZNs.
If the `details` query parameter is set to `true`, the interaction descriptions will be more detailed.
Ids for the queries are required to be unique.
Queries will be processed in parallel.
**It is possible that some/all queries will fail. This will result in error code `207`.**
The response will contain the results of all queries, even if some of them failed.
**The user is responsible for checking the status of each query in the batch.**
post.summary: Query drug-drug interactions between PZNs in batch

400.description: Too many IDs or duplicate IDs

get.description: Get Priscus status for one or more compound names.

200.description: List of input compounds with Priscus status

400.description: Bad request (e.g. missing compounds or too many names)

get.description: Get Priscus status for one or more PZNs. Each PZN can only have one priscus status.

200.description: List of PZNs with Priscus status

get.description: Get active compounds for one or more PZNs. Each PZN can only have multiple active compounds.

200.description: List of PZNs with active compounds

get.description: Get product info (is_combination, category) for one or more PZNs.

200.description: List of PZNs with product info

get.description: Get QT status for one or more compound names. Matches are grouped like the compound search endpoint and include all related compounds sharing the same identifier.

200.description: List of input compounds with QT status

400.description: Bad request (e.g. missing names or too many names)

get.description: Get QT status for one or more PZNs. Each PZN can only have one QT status.

200.description: List of PZNs with QT status

get.description: Get information about the API including version and query limits.
Ping the API to check if it is alive.

delete.description:
The account will be soft deleted.
If the user is the last admin, the account cannot be deleted.
If a user is soft-deleted, the account will be permanently deleted in the future.

patch.description: Requests an email change for the user. An email change token will be sent to the new email address.
patch.summary: Request email change for the user

post.description:
Confirms an email change for the user.
The new email address will be active on the next login.
You have to login (authenticate) with the old email address to confirm the change.
post.summary: Confirm email change for the user

post.description:
Acciqures a JWT token for the user to access the API
Only active users can login
Users can downgrade their role by providing the role in the request (optional)
post.summary: Login for the API to get JWT token

patch.description:
Changes the password for the user. The old password must be provided.
The new password will be active on the next login.

post.description:
Confirms a password reset or first password set for the user.
The API will always return the same message (400) on auth errors to prevent email enumeration.
post.summary: Confirm password reset or first password set

post.description:
Requests a password reset for the user. A password reset token will be sent to the user's email.
Password reset tokens are valid for a limited time.
The API will always return the same message (200) to prevent email enumeration.

Confirms a password reset or first password set for the user.
The API will always return the same message (400) on auth errors to prevent email enumeration.
post.summary: Confirm password reset or first password set

patch.description:
Updates the user profile information. At least one field must be provided for update.
The following fields can be updated: `first name`, `last name`, `organization`.

400.description: No changes requested or invalid data

post.description: Refreshes the JWT token for the user to access the API

status.description: HTTP status code of the query
HTTP status code of the query

max_batch_queries.description: Max number of baches for POST requests

max_drugs.description: Max number of drugs for interaction check

Bearer.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
Bearer.name: Authorization
